narrative:
Shaker Heights City Sd city school district has 25,092 registered voters, with 49.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 5.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 45.4%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 39.7 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +20.9% D−R vs +49.8% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
